toolMapping.ASK_USER: If uncertain, note assumptions in the spec and proceed. List any ambiguities for the user to review

entryPoint.trigger: When the user asks you to run 'specops', mentions 'spec-driven development', or asks you to 'create a spec' for a feature, bugfix, or refactor
